title: stylobasium australe
intro: Stylobasium australe, also known as the native Austral stylobasium or the Tasmanian stylobasium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pandanaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its root and leaves. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and astringent properties. Stylobasium australe can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, although its safety and efficacy should be further studied and verified.
